info.name: Log.AI-CAMS — Moods
info.description:
Mood Reference API — CMS (React & Flutter)

Base URL: {{baseUrl}}
Auth: Bearer {{accessToken}}

Endpoints:
  GET /api/moods  — All active moods, sorted by Priority ASC then Name ASC (DB-level)

MoodTypeEnum:    Calm=0, Focus=1, Energetic=2
EntityStatusEnum: Inactive=0, Active=1

See: docs/moods/API_Moods.md

request.description:
Get all active moods sorted by Priority ASC (nulls last), then Name ASC.

Auth: SystemAdmin ✅, BrandManager ✅, StoreManager ✅

Notes:
- No pagination — mood list is always small (typically 3–10 items).
- Moods are global reference data, not brand-scoped.
- Typically used to populate dropdown when creating a Track or Override.
- Sort is done at DB level: ORDER BY (priority IS NULL), priority, name.

response.name: 200 OK — Mood list
